summary: Referrals for criminal prosecution fell 36% in Fiscal 2025, which DOI's own reporting attributes to handling fewer, more complex investigations involving smaller numbers of people rather than a high volume of simpler cases. The Fiscal 2026 total is also lower in part because DOI switched to a new case-management system in February 2025 that counts each case referred for prosecution as one referral, instead of counting every individual named within that case as the old system did; the FY26 figure is also a year-to-date total that will continue to update as the year closes out.

sources.label: DOI, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report
